label: Base Width
summary: Blade width at base; wider reads heavier, narrower quicker.
details: Controls silhouette at the guard.
Pair with tip width and distal taper.

label: Blade Family
summary: Preset silhouette helpers: straight, flamberge, kris.
details: Flamberge: wavy edges; Kris: centerline undulation.
Kris uses odd wave counts.

label: Blade Thickness
summary: Thickness (Z) through the blade; affects stiffness and mass.
details: Pair with taper % for realistic dynamics.
Left/Right thickness bias allows asymmetry.

label: Cross Section
summary: Transverse profile: flat, diamond, lenticular, hex, triangular, T-spine.
details: Changes edge geometry and how light rolls.
Some sections suit certain eras/styles.

label: Blade Curvature
summary: Curves the blade into an arc. Higher = more curved.
details: Positive arcs toward the edge; negative away.
Curvature interacts with fuller placement and tip style.

label: Edge Bevel
summary: Bevels the edge versus the spine; higher thickens the spine/facets.
details: 0 = sharp thin spine, 1 = thick facets.
Changes how light sweeps across faces.

label: Fuller Inset
summary: Groove depth inside thickness for carved fullers.
details: Defaults to Fuller Depth if unset.
Too deep may weaken the spine on thin blades.

label: Fuller Mode
summary: Overlay (visual ribbons) or carve (actual groove).
details: Overlay is faster; carve reduces thickness.
Carved fullers interact with thickness/taper.

label: Fuller Profile
summary: Groove shape: U, V, or flat-bottom.
details: Profile affects highlights and depth feel.

label: Fuller Width
summary: Groove width across a blade face; set per-carve or auto.
details: Wider fullers lighten the blade visually.
Use per-side slots for multiple grooves.

label: Hollow Bias
summary: Offsets hollow grind toward edge or spine.
details: Negative = toward edge; positive = toward spine.

label: Hollow Depth
summary: How deep the hollow grind cuts into the face.
details: Higher = stronger concavity.
Works with Radius and Bias.

label: Hollow Grind
summary: Enable concave grind; tune radius/depth/bias.
details: Smaller radius = deeper concavity.
Depth controls how far the hollow bites into the face.

label: Hollow Mix
summary: Blend between flat (0) and hollowed (1) faces.
details: Increases concavity contribution to faces.

label: Hollow Radius
summary: Curvature radius for the hollow grind arc.
details: Smaller radius curves more.
Pairs with depth for overall concavity.

label: Kris Waves
summary: Number of centerline undulations for Kris blades.
details: Use odd counts for traditional look.

label: Leaf Bulge
summary: Adds a belly to the blade for leaf shapes.
details: Increases width mid-blade, tapering toward the tip.

label: Left Thickness
summary: Z thickness along left edge (−X).
details: Bias thickness for asymmetrical grinds.
Keep within structural limits.

label: Blade Length
summary: Overall blade length along Y; longer shifts balance forward.
details: Sets span from guard to tip.
Impacts mass, center of mass, and point of balance.

label: Right Thickness
summary: Z thickness along right edge (+X).
details: Mirror of Left Thickness.
Balance with bevel and cross-section.

label: Sori Bias
summary: Exponent bias for the selected sori curve.
details: Fine-tunes where curvature concentrates.

label: Sori Profile
summary: Curvature distribution: centered (torii), base (koshi), or tip (saki).
details: Requires non-zero curvature.
Shapes where the arc is strongest.

label: Taper Base %
summary: Thickness scale at base (100% = no change).
details: Controls starting thickness near guard.

label: Taper Mid %
summary: Thickness scale around mid-blade.
details: Adjusts mass through the working region.

label: Taper Tip %
summary: Thickness scale at the tip.
details: Lower values thin the tip.

label: Tip Shape
summary: Choose tip family: pointed, rounded, leaf, clip, tanto, spear, sheepsfoot.
details: Alters the last portion of the outline.
Leaf unlocks Leaf Bulge control.

label: Tip Width
summary: Width near the tip. Lower = finer point and less drag.
details: Affects penetration and visual sharpness.
Keep reasonable vs base width to avoid stubby tips.

label: What is a Fuller?
summary: A longitudinal groove along a blade face to reduce mass and tune stiffness.
details: Also called a rib or blood groove (myth).
Wider fullers reduce weight without greatly sacrificing rigidity.
Placement and depth matter for strength and aesthetics.

label: Blend Fillet
summary: Small bridge piece between blade and guard.
details: Adds a smoother transition.
Use Fillet Style to pick shape.

label: Fillet Style
summary: Shape of the bridge piece: box or smooth.
details: Smooth transitions blend into the blade more organically.

label: Guard Style
summary: Choose guard family: bar, winged, claw, disk, knucklebow, swept, basket.
details: Affects silhouette and period feel.
Some styles unlock extra options (basket rods/rings).

label: Guard Tilt
summary: Rotates the guard around the blade axis (radians).
details: Small negative tilts favor downward quillons.
Affects hand clearance and aesthetics.

label: Guard Width
summary: Crossguard span left–right for protection and balance.
details: Match blade base width for classical looks.
Very wide guards can clip accessories.

label: Wrap Depth
summary: Radial amplitude of the wrap pattern.
details: Higher depth is more pronounced.
Balance with hand comfort and silhouette.

label: Wrap Style
summary: Adds stylized grip wrapping (hineri, katate, wire).
details: Enable texture for katate to show diagonals.
Combine with Turns and Depth.

label: Wrap Turns
summary: Number of helical cycles along the grip.
details: More turns = denser cross-over pattern.
Adjust depth to keep comfort.

label: Pommel Size
summary: Overall pommel scale; larger shifts balance toward the hand.
details: Use with Balance slider for auto-target.
Keep proportionate to blade length.

label: Pommel Style
summary: Choose pommel family (orb, disk, spike, wheel, ring, crown).
details: Affects balance and period feel.
Some options unlock extra controls (spike, ring, crown).

label: Bloom Enabled
summary: Enable bright glow around high-intensity areas.
details: Increase strength for more glow; threshold controls when it kicks in.

label: Outline Enabled
summary: Edge-outline pass for a stylized look.
details: Strength and thickness control line feel; color sets edge tint.

label: Vignette
summary: Darken corners to frame the subject.
details: Use sparingly; strength and softness adjust fade.

label: Task: Add a Fuller
summary: Add a groove to lighten the blade and adjust its look.
details: Set Fuller Mode to Carve or Overlay.
Adjust width and profile; use inset for carved depth.
Preview with Explain Mode and highlight the blade.
